description: A shipment is ready to be picked up by a carrier. The shipping clerk must generate the legal Bill of Lading document.

nodes.task_description: Select the shipment that is ready for pickup.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent correctly identifies the shipment record in the TMS.

nodes.task_description: Verify all details, including addresses, piece count, weight, and freight class.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent confirms all data required for the BOL is accurate.

nodes.task_description: Generate the BOL document in the standard format.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully generates a printable, legally compliant BOL document.
